title: scutellaria cypria subsp. elatior
intro: Scutellaria cypria subsp. elatior, also known as Greater Skullcap, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Cyprus and other parts of the Mediterranean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Scutellaria cypria subsp. elatior is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
